title: Podcast English — Interview Style
description: Active listening patterns: interruption, follow-up, building on a guest's answer.
summary_pt_br: Frases de podcast: 'Tell me more', 'Pushing back', 'Come back to that', 'Critics who claim'.

scenes.subtitle_en: Active listening patterns: interruption, follow-up, building on a guest's answer.
scenes.subtitle_pt: Frases de podcast: 'Tell me more', 'Pushing back', 'Come back to that', 'Critics who claim'.

scenes.text_en: Active listening patterns: interruption, follow-up, building on a guest's answer. Focus: podcast english — interview style. Tell me more about that moment in the story.
scenes.text_pt: Frases de podcast: 'Tell me more', 'Pushing back', 'Come back to that', 'Critics who claim'. Foco: podcast english — interview style. Me conte mais sobre esse momento da história.

scenes.title: Podcast English — Interview Style
scenes.body_en: Host moves: 'Tell me more about...', 'Pushing back a little,...', 'You mentioned X — let's come back to that.', 'What do you say to critics who claim...?'
scenes.body_pt: Frases de podcast: 'Tell me more', 'Pushing back', 'Come back to that', 'Critics who claim'.

examples.en: Tell me more about that moment in the story.
examples.pt: Me conte mais sobre esse momento da história.

examples.en: Pushing back a little — don't you think that oversimplifies?
examples.pt: Provocando um pouco — não acha que simplifica demais?

examples.en: You mentioned your mentor earlier; let's come back to that.
examples.pt: Você mencionou seu mentor; vamos voltar nisso.

scenes.title: Key vocabulary — Podcast English — Interview Style

exercise.question: Complete: "Tell me more about that ___ in the story."
exercise.explanation: Full sentence: "Tell me more about that moment in the story."
exercise.hint_pt_br: Me conte mais sobre esse momento da história.

exercise.question: Which sentence is correct?
options: I haven't heard anything about that.
Pushing back a little — don't you think that oversimplifies?
exercise.explanation: Correct: "Pushing back a little — don't you think that oversimplifies?"
exercise.hint_pt_br: Provocando um pouco — não acha que simplifica demais?

exercise.explanation: Key terms from the lesson — match each to its meaning.

scenes.title: Podcast English — Interview Style — dialog
scenes.pt_summary: Diálogo sobre podcast english — interview style. Pratique as frases marcadas.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you keep an interview moving without derailing it?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Ask short follow-ups, not long statements.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: When is it okay to push back?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: When the claim leaves an important gap.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: How do you steer a rambling guest?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Gentle rephrase, then a pointed question.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: What's the first sign of a great interview?

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: The guest says something they didn't plan.

turns.speaker: user
turns.target: Ask what they've changed their mind about.

turns.speaker: ai
turns.text: Podcasting is the quiet craft of asking better.

scenes.title: The interview
scenes.pt_summary: Ouça com atenção. Depois, escreva em inglês o que entendeu — resumo, análise, e sua opinião crítica. O professor avaliará.
scenes.prompt_en: Summarize the host's three best moves. Use at least three podcast-English phrases.
scenes.prompt_pt: Escreva em inglês o que ouviu. Análise crítica com quem falou, argumentos, e sua reflexão.

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: On an afternoon recording, Zara observed a podcast host interview a reluctant expert with remarkable patience.

paragraphs.speaker: Host
paragraphs.en: Tell me more about that moment — I think our listeners want to hear the uncomfortable version.

paragraphs.speaker: Host
paragraphs.en: Pushing back a little — doesn't that framing leave out the counter-example you mentioned in chapter three?

paragraphs.speaker: Guest
paragraphs.en: Fair point. You've done your reading. Let me rephrase what I actually meant in the book.

paragraphs.speaker: Host
paragraphs.en: We have two minutes left. What have you changed your mind about since writing the book?

paragraphs.speaker: Narrator
paragraphs.en: Great interviewing, Zara noted, is mostly quiet — and almost entirely listening for the next real question.

scenes.title: Recap reading
scenes.passage_en: At Amazing School, the advanced class just finished "Podcast English — Interview Style". Active listening patterns: interruption, follow-up, building on a guest's answer. Tell me more about that moment in the story. Pushing back a little — don't you think that oversimplifies? Mr. Kumar reminded the students that at this level, reading widely and writing daily are non-negotiable.

check.question: According to Mr. Kumar, what is non-negotiable at this level?
check.explanation: At C-level, wide reading and daily writing are essential.
check.hint_pt_br: Leitura ampla e escrita diária são essenciais no C.

scenes.title: Listen to Bia
scenes.audio_text_en: Hello! I'm Bia, from Praia do Sol. Today in advanced class we studied "Podcast English — Interview Style". It was demanding but genuinely rewarding. See you next session!

check.question: What did Bia study today?
check.explanation: She says the title: "Podcast English — Interview Style".
check.hint_pt_br: Ela fala o título: "Podcast English — Interview Style".

scenes.title: Go deeper — advanced resources
scenes.body_pt: Fontes avançadas pra aprofundar. Leitura regular é o que separa um aluno avançado de um proficiente.
